heading: Expenditures; units excepted from soil survey and land classification requirements
label: 620i Expenditures; units excepted from soil survey and land classification requirements
text: Expenditures for the Flaming Gorge, Glen Canyon, Wayne N. Aspinall, and Navajo initial units of the Colorado River storage project may be made without regard to the soil survey and land classification requirements of section 390a of this title.1See References in Text note below.1
notes: References in Text, referred to in text, was in the original a reference to the Interior Department Appropriation Act, 1954.
